title: Thirst Was Taken
description: A modern take on thirst, compatible with Create, Farmer's Delight & more.
body: ### 💧 1.3.0 Update - 1.20.1 is now supported (thanks to [mlus233](https://github.com/mlus-asuka)) - **Fire protection** and **fire resistance** slow down dehydration - You can **find** various **drinks** in structures' chests - Piglins now trade **Purified Water** - The Sand Filter now has a **Ponder** scene **Thirst was Taken** is a simple mod that adds a thirst mechanic to the game, but that fits well in modpacks (especially aesthetics-oriented ones) by adding diverse features and compatibility with a lot of often-used mods. ### 💧 Water Purity Water can have 4 different levels of purity, depending on where it was harvested: ![](https://imgur.com/9HA6FXF.png) If you **drink non-purified water**, depending on the purity level, you will have a chance to get **sick**, or worse, **poisoned**. Water can be **purified** on a **campfire** or a **furnace**: a campfire will purify it by 1 unit, and a furnace by 2 (meaning it will go from Dirty to Acceptable, for instance). ![](https://imgur.com/Ekh8huc.png) ### ☀ Climate & Cold Sweat The **hydration depletion** speed is **biome-dependent**, meaning you will get thirsty more easily in **hot** or **dry** biomes, and less so in **cold** or **wet** ones. Hydration is more relevant than temperature, so building your base in wet biomes is more advisable than doing so in cold ones. This system is also compatible with **Cold Sweat**, and will use their more precise temperature calculations if the mod is present in the pack. ### 🍖 Farmer's Delight & Co. The stack size for **water bottles** has been increased to **64**, to make them fit with the foods from Farmer's Delight. Every food item that should quench your thirst added by farmer's delight, respite, and brewin and chewin' is integrated by default, making teas (or booze) the **best late-game hydration source**. ### ⚙ Create A new block is added if you have Create installed: the **Sand Filter**, which can purify water fed to it by pipes. ![](https://i.imgur.com/UdIApb3.png) ### 💧 Apple Skin The mod is compatible with apple skin, showing the "quenched" overlay if the mod is present, as well as tooltips for every item that quenches your thirst. ![](https://imgur.com/pbqR6Ea.png) ##### To learn more about the mod, you can check out the [Wiki](https://github.com/ghen-git/Thirst-Mod/wiki) or the [Discord](https://discord.gg/wqfgcZCfYh) ##### This mod is still very early in development, which means it's filled to the brim with bugs and glitches. Sorry
